name: Olive Garden Pasta with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Bechamel Sauce: Melt butter in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Add milk and bouillon and stir vigorously with a wire whisk until the mixture barely comes to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, whisking frequently. Keep warm.
2. Prepare the broccoli: Drain the broccoli and divide it into halves. Chop half of the florets into 1/4-inch pieces. Reserve the other half for later.
3. Sauté the vegetables: Heat a large sauté pan over medium heat and add olive oil. Add all the chopped broccoli, garlic, green onions, and mushrooms to the pan. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes or until the mushrooms begin to turn golden.
4. Combine the sauce and veggies: Add the sautéed vegetables and parsley to the warm bechamel sauce and stir well.
5. Serve: Serve the pasta with the combined sauce and Parmesan cheese.
